testsuite.name: GET /api/v1/rules/{ruleKey} - 获取规则详情

testcase.name: 查询不存在的规则应抛出异常
应成功获取已存在的规则

testsuite.system-out: 2026-03-29 17:22:52.337 [Test worker] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - delete from rule_versions rv1_0 Hibernate: delete from rule_versions rv1_0 2026-03-29 17:22:52.338 [Test worker] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - delete from rules r1_0 Hibernate: delete from rules r1_0 2026-03-29 17:22:52.341 [Test worker] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - select r1_0.id, r1_0.created_at, r1_0.created_by, r1_0.enabled, r1_0.groovy_script, r1_0.opt_lock_version, r1_0.rule_description, r1_0.rule_key, r1_0.rule_name, r1_0.status, r1_0.updated_at, r1_0.updated_by, r1_0.version from rules r1_0 where r1_0.rule_key=?
